panels.title: Community
panels.description: Browse shared content, chat, and discover packages

panels.title: AI Agents
panels.changeNote: Live contract graph with agent presence, session history, and utilization stats.
featureHighlights: Contract graph overlay
Agent session tracking
Activity history
Utilization stats
panels.description: AI agent observability — live activity, contract graph, session history

panels.title: App Map
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for architecture mapping tool.
featureHighlights: Live architecture map for features, registries, and plugin surfaces.
panels.description: Live map of features, plugins, registries, and architecture diagnostics

panels.title: Asset Maintenance
panels.description: Hash coverage, storage sync, video health (broken-video scan), duplicates, and other asset maintenance tools.

panels.title: Capability Testing
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for capability validation tool.
featureHighlights: Manual validation surface for capability registration and behavior.
panels.description: Test and validate system capabilities

panels.title: Console
panels.description: Interactive command console for the pixsim namespace (Blender-style)

panels.title: Content Map
panels.changeNote: Use as a cross-source inventory/health overview; drill into dedicated panels for operations.
featureHighlights: Browse packs, primitives, vocabularies, plugins, and templates in one place.
panels.description: Discovery and health map of content sources with panel drilldowns.

panels.title: Content Packs
panels.description: Maintenance panel for content-pack inventory, orphan detection, and purge controls.

panels.title: Context Hub
panels.description: Inspect active context providers and overrides

panels.title: Dev Tools
panels.description: Developer tools and diagnostics

panels.title: Docs
panels.changeNote: Standalone documentation browser extracted from App Map.
featureHighlights: Browse, search, and read project documentation with linked navigation.
panels.description: Browse and search project documentation

panels.title: Generation Health
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for generation diagnostics tool.
featureHighlights: Generation health and diagnostics visibility for content pipelines.
panels.description: Monitor content generation health and diagnostics

panels.title: Gizmo Surfaces
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for gizmo surface management tool.
featureHighlights: Centralized debugging surface for overlays and gizmo dashboards.
panels.description: Manage gizmo overlays and debug dashboard surfaces

panels.title: Log Viewer
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for structured log inspection tool.
featureHighlights: Trace and request-level backend log exploration UI.
panels.description: Query and inspect structured backend logs, trace jobs and requests

panels.title: Performance
panels.changeNote: Frontend performance dashboard — heap, FPS, DOM nodes, long tasks, blob caches, Zustand stores.
featureHighlights: JS heap sparkline and usage stats
FPS counter with jank detection
Long task observer (> 50ms)
Blob URL cache utilization
Zustand store size inventory
panels.description: Monitor frontend performance — heap, FPS, long tasks, caches, store sizes

panels.title: Plans
panels.changeNote: New plan registry browser with metadata, markdown, sync, and event history.
featureHighlights: Browse plans by status, view markdown, sync registry, activity feed.
panels.description: Browse and manage plan registry — manifests, sync, events

panels.title: Plans Graph
panels.changeNote: New plans graph panel — reactflow + dagre, mirrors DependencyGraphPanel pattern.
featureHighlights: Color by status, lane:* tags as cluster backgrounds, umbrellas larger, click to open plan detail.
panels.description: Network view of plan registry — parentId + dependsOn edges, lane clusters, click to open in Plans panel

panels.title: Prompt Test Suite
panels.changeNote: Initial scaffold: variant × image matrix for systematic token testing.
featureHighlights: Matrix A/B testing of prompt token variants against input images.
panels.description: A/B test prompt token variants against input images

panels.title: Semantic Surface Inspector
panels.changeNote: Initial coverage matrix view (v0).
featureHighlights: Heatmap of primitive packs / categories vs ontology namespaces.
Color scale highlights low / zero coverage cells so gaps pop visually.
Click a cell to see contributing block_ids + text previews.
panels.description: Visual coverage of primitive packs against ontology namespaces

panels.title: Session State Viewer
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for session state inspection tool.
featureHighlights: World/session flags and relationship inspection in one panel.
panels.description: Inspect GameSession flags, relationships, and world time

panels.title: SQL Query Explorer
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for SQL diagnostics panel.
featureHighlights: Read-only SQL exploration for operational diagnostics.
panels.description: Run read-only SQL queries for diagnostics and data exploration

panels.title: Test Overview
panels.changeNote: Folded the standalone Diagnostics panel in as an admin-only section — one Testing surface instead of two.
featureHighlights: Test profile and suite coverage snapshots in one place.
Admin: run server-side diagnostics with a live event stream, alongside the automated-suite catalog.
panels.description: Test runner profiles, suite coverage, run history, and (admin) the live diagnostic runner.

panels.title: Types Explorer
panels.changeNote: Added canonical metadata baseline for generated-type explorer.
featureHighlights: One-stop browsing for generated OpenAPI and composition-role types.
panels.description: Browse generated types: composition roles, region labels, OpenAPI

panels.title: Vocabulary Candidates
panels.changeNote: Initial vocabulary harvest review panel.
featureHighlights: Inspect keywords matched against role lists but missing ontology mappings.
Trigger LLM proposal batches and accept / reject / remap each suggestion.
panels.description: Review parser keywords harvested for vocabulary growth

panels.description: Create and manage block templates for random prompt composition

Direct panel-group preset application to active dock widgets.
